nameMeanings.name: Måns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jönsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Lars, Lennart, Thor, Alf, Anders, Arni, Erik, Jorgen, Mats, Olafur, Per.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Jon, Scandinavian form of John . Compare Jonson 2.
English: variant of   Johnson  , although this form of the English name may have died out in Britain.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: When Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud was born about 1440, in Dalarna, Sweden, his father, Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs, was 41 and his mother, Kerstin Olofsdotter, was 41. He had at least 3 sons with Carin Staffansdotter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud est né environ 1440, à Dalarna, Suède, son père, Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Kerstin Olofsdotter, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Carin Staffansdotter.

de.lifeSummary: Als Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud um 1440 in Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs 41 und seine Mutter Kerstin Olofsdotter 41. Er hatte mit Carin Staffansdotter mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud è nato il circa 1440 nel Dalarna, Svezia, il suo padre, Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Kerstin Olofsdotter, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Carin Staffansdotter.

ja.lifeSummary: Måns Jönsson Svinhufvudが約1440年にスウェーデンダラーナで生まれた時，父Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäsは41歳，母Kerstin Olofsdotterは41歳であった。彼はCarin Staffansdotterとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud(이)가 대략 1440년 스웨덴 다라른아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Kerstin Olofsdotter(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Carin Staffansdotter(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Dalarna, Suécia, seu pai, Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Kerstin Olofsdotter, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Carin Staffansdotter.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud родился около 1440 г. в местности даларна, Швеция, его отцу по имени Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Kerstin Olofsdotter, 41. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Carin Staffansdotter.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Måns Jönsson Svinhufvud nació aproximadamente 1440, en Dalarna, Suecia, su papá, Jöns Ingemarsson Svinhufvud till Ornäs, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Kerstin Olofsdotter, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Carin Staffansdotter.
